description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:4.6-jdk8-alpine Docker image, setting GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository .gradle directory via before_script and defining the GRADLE_OPTS variable as -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define a single test stage and add ten jobs named test:t1 through test:t10, each excluding the branch csui-advprog-2018/lab and only running on branches whose names match the regex /.*tutorial[_-].*X$/ where X is the tutorial number. For each job, run the corresponding Gradle check task (e.g., gradle :tutorial-1:check for test:t1, gradle :tutorial-2:check for test:t2, etc.); test:t7 also runs gradle :tutorial-7:jacocoTestReport after the check. Jobs test:t5, test:t6, test:t7, test:t8, test:t9, and test:t10 declare artifacts with paths /tutorial-5/build/*, /tutorial-6/build/*, /tutorial-7/build/*, /tutorial-8/build/*, /tutorial-9/build/*, and /tutorial-10/build/* respectively. No additional services, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
